Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present, represented by Kim Reeder.
Attorney Nicole Santiago appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Richard Allen is present.
Attorney Robert Beyers representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB 2, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
